name: Code blocks — FRONTEND_AUDIT_AND_FIX_PLAN.md
what_it_solves: Index of every fenced code block in '/mnt/results/FRONTEND_AUDIT_AND_FIX_PLAN.md'.
how_it_solves: Extracted with `RE_CODE_BLOCK`; each block carries language, starting line, byte count, and a 400-char preview.
why_it_exists: Reports embed code snippets that are load-bearing (e.g. class definitions, config JSON); this makes them addressable without re-reading the parent file.

blocks.preview:
sl_agent/           ← Full FastAPI backend (app.py, routes.py, kb_routes.py, multimodal_routes.py)

sl_agent/kb/        ← CIViC, ClinVar, JAX, CGI clients
sl_agent/multimodal/ ← literature_receipts.py, matrix_builder.py, modality_fuser.py, pharmacologic_analyzer.py, replication_stress.py
sl_patch/           ←

rootDir: oncology-coPilot
buildCommand: npm install && npm run build
staticPublishPath: ./dist

services:
  - type: web
    name: crispro-frontend
    env: static
    buildCommand: npm install && npm run build
    staticPublishPath: dist
    envVars:
      - key: NODE_VERSION
        value: 18.x
      - key: VITE_API_ROOT
        value: https://crispro-backend-v3.onrender.com
